mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, h.title, h.course_name AS courseName, h.deadline, h.status, h.grading_status AS gradingStatus, COUNT(s.id) AS submitCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gradedCount FROM homework h LEFT JOIN homework_submission s ON h.id = s.homework_id AND s.is_deleted = 0
h.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND h.is_deleted = 0
AND h.status = 1 AND h.deadline > NOW()
AND (h.status = 2 OR h.deadline <= NOW())
AND h.grading_status = 1
GROUP BY h.id ORDER BY h.create_time DESC
